metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for data quality — CSV audits, end-to-end campaign data quality (email/phone validation + deduplication), and DQE One Server process management via MCP. Built by DQE Software.

plugins.name: dqe-quality
plugins.description: Data quality suite for Claude Code. Audit CSVs (6 DQE dimensions, HTML report), run end-to-end campaign workflows (email/phone validation + deduplication via DQE One Server MCP), and manage DQE processes from Claude Code.
